meta.title: Christopher Sands on the Keystone XL Pipeline Decision for CBC
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Christopher Sands joined the CBC on January 18, 2012 to discuss the Keystone XL Pipeline decision. What does the rejection by Obama mean for the future of this project?
